versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   clearml-serving-1-6-2           true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: clearml
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: clearml-serving-1-6-2
      name: clearml-serving
      namespace: clearml
      values: |
        clearml-serving:
          kafka: {enabled: false}
          prometheus: {enabled: false}
          grafana: {enabled: false}
          clearml_serving_triton: {enabled: false}
